metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_2315
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Fig.3A: "A punctate and discrete CapZ signal was found in the spines of CA1 pyramidal and dentate granule cells (Fig. 3A, N = 4 cells each from four mice from three independent experiments for CA1 apical, CA1 basal and dentate apical dendrites)."
Fig. 3C. "CapZ beta 2 was often detected at the postsynaptic density (arrows) and
was also found in the extrasynaptic plasma membrane and cytosol (arrowheads) of dendritic spines". Experimental description: Fig. 3. "Distribution and localization of CapZ in the hippocampus in vivo. (A) The CapZ i.r. (purple) in spines was examined in the brain sections of Thy1-mGFP (membrane-bound GFP; green) mice."
